headline: Roper Technologies (ROP) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Weakness And Mixed Long Term Returns
summary: Roper Technologies (ROP) has been drawing attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing a 1.5% gain over the past day, but negative returns over the month and the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Roper Technologies. The latest 1 day share price return of 1.5% and 7 day gain of 5% come after a 30 day share price decline of 3% and a 90 day decline of 18.8%. At the same time, the 1 year total shareholder return of 38.8% and 5 year total shareholder return of 3.6%...

headline: Roper Technologies Refines Portfolio As Education And Payments Software Evolve
summary: Roper Technologies’ subsidiaries Illumia and Procare Solutions have announced new developments in education and payments technology. Illumia has launched a refreshed brand identity, combining the former Transact and CBORD operations under one banner. Procare Solutions has released an industry trends report focused on early childhood education and care providers. These updates arrive at a time when NasdaqGS:ROP shares trade at $361.27, with the stock down 16.9% year to date and 38.8% over...

headline: Jack Henry (JKHY) Down 3.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Jack Henry (JKHY) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: DAT introduces widget for iPhone to help owner-operators find loads faster
summary: PORTLAND, Ore., March 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- DAT Freight & Analytics today introduced the DAT One iOS widget for iPhone, displaying load matches directly on the home screen to help carriers capitalize on real-time rate trends without opening the DAT One app. The DAT One iOS widget refreshes automatically and shows the top three loads with the highest rate per mile based on the most recent search in the DAT One app, providing a competitive edge in a fast-moving freight market. “Owner-operat
